prompt: I need a button that navigates to /dashboard using Next.js routing. It should look like a solid highlight button. How do I do this in hearth-react?

assertions.check: Code example uses asChild prop on the Button component

assertions.text: Wraps NextLink (from next/link) as the child
assertions.check: Code example imports NextLink from next/link and uses it as the child of Button
Code example sets variant='solid' on the Button
Code example sets colorScheme='highlight' on the Button

assertions.text: Does not nest NextLink inside Button without asChild
assertions.check: Response does not show NextLink nested inside Button without the asChild prop
